technology.title: Conflicting Rulings Leave Anthropic in ‘Supply-Chain Risk’ Limbo
technology.summary: A US appeals court ruling is at odds with a separate, lower court decision from March, leaving uncertainty about if and how the US military can use the AI company's Claude model.

briefing.news_focus: A US appeals court ruling is at odds with a separate, lower court decision from March, leaving uncertainty about if and how the US military can use the AI company's Claude model.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國上訴法院的裁決與三月的低級法院決定相矛盾，造成AI公司Anthropic在供應鏈風險方面的困境，特別是美軍是否能使用其Claude模型的問題仍然不明朗。
briefing.background: Anthropic是一家專注於開發人工智慧技術的公司，其Claude模型在業界受到廣泛關注。隨著AI技術的迅速發展，美國軍方對於這類技術的需求日益增加。然而，法律框架尚未完全跟上技術的進步，導致法院對於軍方使用AI技術的裁決出現分歧，進一步影響了供應鏈的穩定性與安全性。
briefing.analysis: 此次裁決的矛盾使得Anthropic面臨不確定性，可能影響其與美軍的合作關係。美軍希望利用AI提升作戰效率，但法律障礙可能使其無法獲得Claude模型的支持。此情況對於AI產業的其他公司也有示範效應，可能導致投資者對於軍方合作的謹慎態度，進而影響整體市場的發展方向。

technology.title: Greece to ban social media for under-15s from next year
technology.summary: It follows similar moves in other European countries, including France and Spain.

briefing.news_focus: It follows similar moves in other European countries, including France and Spain.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 希臘政府宣布將於明年開始禁止15歲以下青少年使用社交媒體，此舉與法國和西班牙等其他歐洲國家的類似政策相呼應，旨在保護未成年人免受網絡風險的影響。
briefing.background: 隨著社交媒體的普及，未成年人面臨的網絡安全問題日益嚴重，包括網絡欺凌、隱私洩露及不當內容接觸。歐洲多國政府已開始採取措施，限制未成年人使用社交媒體，以促進更安全的網絡環境。希臘的這一政策反映了對未成年人保護的重視，並可能成為歐洲其他國家的參考範本。
briefing.analysis: 希臘的禁令可能會引發社交媒體平台的反應，這些平台需調整其服務以遵守新規，可能影響其用戶基數及廣告收入。此外，家長和教育機構可能支持此政策，認為這能減少青少年面臨的風險。然而，反對者則可能擔心此舉會限制青少年的社交自由及信息獲取，並質疑政府的干預是否過度。未來，該政策的實施效果及其對社交媒體生態系統的影響將成為關注焦點。

technology.title: Hack-for-hire group caught targeting Android devices and iCloud backups
technology.summary: Security researchers exposed a spying campaign by a hack-for-hire group that used Android spyware and phishing to steal iCloud credentials and hack victims’ devices.

briefing.news_focus: Security researchers exposed a spying campaign by a hack-for-hire group that used Android spyware and phishing to steal iCloud credentials and hack victims’ devices.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 一個黑客租用集團被揭露針對Android設備和iCloud備份進行間諜行動，利用Android間諜軟件和釣魚手段竊取iCloud憑證，入侵受害者設備。
briefing.background: 隨著數位化程度的提高，黑客租用服務逐漸興起，這些集團專門為客戶提供網絡攻擊服務。Android系統因其開放性而成為攻擊的主要目標，而iCloud則因其廣泛使用而成為黑客的潛在獵物。此事件反映出數據安全和隱私保護的挑戰，尤其是在移動設備和雲端服務日益普及的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 這一事件對於用戶、科技公司及執法機構均有深遠影響。用戶面臨個人數據被竊取的風險，科技公司需加強安全防護措施以保護用戶資料。執法機構則可能面臨更大的挑戰，因為黑客租用集團的行為往往跨越國界，增加了追查的難度。各方可能會加強合作以打擊此類犯罪，但也可能因資源分配和法律框架的不同而產生摩擦。

politics.title: Middle East crisis live: Trump warns Iran to comply with ‘real agreement’ as ceasefire in doubt over Israeli attacks on Lebanon
politics.summary: US president warns that the US will start ‘shooting’ again unless Iran fully complies with deal Middle East ceasefire in serious doubt as Israel assaults Lebanon and Iran blocks oil tankers The UK foreign minister, Yvette Cooper , has said Lebanon must be included in any ceasefire agreement. In other remarks now being reported by Reuters, Cooper added that shipping through the strait of Hormuz must be toll-free . Amid ceasefire talks, Tehran has proposed fees or tolls on vessels to safely pass through the strait. Donald Trump on Wednesday suggested the US and Iran could collect tolls in a joint venture, while the White House said the priority was reopening the strait without limitations. And my principles and values made sure that our decisions were that we wouldn’t get involved in the action without a lawful basis, without a viable, thought-through plan.” Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: US president warns that the US will start ‘shooting’ again unless Iran fully complies with deal Middle East ceasefire in serious doubt as Israel assaults Lebanon and Iran blocks oil tankers The UK foreign minister, Yvette Cooper , has said Lebanon must be included in any ceasefire agreement. In other remarks now being reported by Reuters, Cooper added that shipping through the strait of Hormuz must be toll-free . Amid ceasefire talks, Tehran has proposed fees or tolls on vessels to safely pass through the strait. Donald Trump on Wednesday suggested the US and Iran could collect tolls in a joint venture, while the White House said the priority was reopening the strait without limitations. And my principles and values made sure that our decisions were that we wouldn’t get involved in the action without a lawful basis, without a viable, thought-through plan.” Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普警告伊朗必須遵守協議，否則將重新開火。以色列對黎巴嫩的攻擊使中東停火前景堪憂，伊朗則阻擋油輪通行。英國外相呼籲將黎巴嫩納入停火協議，並提議霍爾木茲海峽的通行應免收費。
briefing.background: 中東地區的緊張局勢持續升級，特別是以色列與黎巴嫩的衝突加劇，影響到地區的安全與經濟。特朗普政府一直強調對伊朗的強硬立場，並試圖透過外交手段促使伊朗遵守核協議。英國在此背景下，試圖促進停火並保障海上航運的安全，顯示出其在地區穩定中的角色。
briefing.analysis: 此次發展顯示出美國對伊朗施壓的強度加大，特朗普的警告表明若伊朗不遵守協議，美國可能會採取軍事行動。英國的立場則強調了多邊合作的重要性，尤其是在黎巴嫩的角色上。這樣的動態可能導致各方在停火協議上的談判更加複雜，特別是伊朗對霍爾木茲海峽的通行費提議，可能引發進一步的地緣政治摩擦。

politics.title: Israeli military says it has killed nephew of Hezbollah chief
politics.summary: Israel’s military said Thursday it had struck and killed a close adviser to Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem in Beirut a day earlier, when Israeli strikes pummelled Lebanon. “Yesterday, the IDF struck in the Beirut area and eliminated Ali Yusuf Harshi, the personal secretary and nephew of Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem,” a military statement said. Harshi was “a close associate and personal adviser to... Qassem and played a central role in managing and securing his office”, it added. The...

briefing.news_focus: Israel’s military said Thursday it had struck and killed a close adviser to Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem in Beirut a day earlier, when Israeli strikes pummelled Lebanon. “Yesterday, the IDF struck in the Beirut area and eliminated Ali Yusuf Harshi, the personal secretary and nephew of Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem,” a military statement said. Harshi was “a close associate and personal adviser to... Qassem and played a central role in managing and securing his office”, it added. The...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 以色列軍方宣稱在貝魯特空襲中擊斃了真主黨領袖奈姆·卡西姆的侄子阿里·尤素夫·哈爾希，哈爾希是卡西姆的個人秘書及親密顧問，這一事件加劇了以黎之間的緊張局勢。
briefing.background: 以色列與真主黨之間的衝突歷史悠久，雙方在多次戰爭與衝突中互有攻擊。近期局勢因以色列與哈馬斯的衝突而更加複雜，真主黨在此背景下可能會加強其對以色列的對抗。哈爾希的死可能被視為以色列對真主黨高層的直接打擊，進一步影響黎巴嫩的政治與安全局勢。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件對以色列來說是削弱真主黨指揮結構的戰略行動，可能會提升以色列在地區的軍事威懾力。然而，真主黨可能會以此事件作為動員支持者的理由，進一步激化與以色列的敵對情緒。黎巴嫩政府可能面臨內部壓力，需在維護國家安全與避免衝突升級之間取得平衡。各方立場的差異將影響未來的地區穩定。

politics.title: Donald Trump blasts NATO after closed-door meeting with Mark Rutte
politics.summary: Mr. Trump's outrage at NATO allies over their failure to join in his war against Iran had prompted fears he would seek to pull the United States out of the nearly eight-decade-old alliance

briefing.news_focus: Mr. Trump's outrage at NATO allies over their failure to join in his war against Iran had prompted fears he would seek to pull the United States out of the nearly eight-decade-old alliance
briefing.news_focus_zh: 特朗普在與荷蘭首相馬克·呂特的閉門會議後，對北約盟友未能支持他對伊朗的戰爭表示強烈不滿，這引發了他可能考慮退出這一成立近八十年的聯盟的擔憂。
briefing.background: 北約成立於1949年，旨在加強成員國之間的軍事合作與安全保障。隨著冷戰結束，北約的角色逐漸演變，面對新興威脅如恐怖主義與地緣政治緊張。特朗普在任內對北約的批評，主要集中在盟友的軍事開支不足，這使得美國在防務上的負擔加重。近期對伊朗的政策更是加劇了他對北約盟友支持的失望。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的言論反映了他對北約的根本不滿，尤其是在美國對外政策的單邊主義下，盟友的支持顯得尤為重要。若特朗普真的考慮退出北約，將對美國的國際地位及全球安全架構造成重大影響。北約成員國可能會面臨安全保障的真空，並促使他們重新評估自身的防務策略。此外，這也可能引發其他國家對美國承諾的質疑，進一步影響國際關係的穩定性。

economy.title: Ed Miliband hold firm! North sea oil and gas drilling won’t help anyone other than Nigel Farage | Zoe Williams
economy.summary: It’s worrying to watch Labour entertain Reform’s fantasies about fossil fuels. Only renewables will bring lower bills and higher energy security Ed Miliband is facing a dilemma, apparently. Reform UK is suggesting new oil and gas licences in the North Sea as a way to cut fuel bills and they’re steadily gaining cheerleaders – not just in the media, but also in some trade unions . Labour – having swept into power on a green-friendly manifesto , much of which has already been abandoned, but the kernel of which was to prioritise green over fossil energy – is in a bind. It’s plain that fresh exploration of the North Sea would run counter to the party’s every principle, and particularly those of Miliband, whose legacy will be his career-long commitment to the scrappy, dogged, surely often tedious and dispiriting legislative fight against climate breakdown. And yet, equally plainly, the pressure from Nigel Farage is only going to get more intense: he has framed the issue of North Sea oil and gas versus renewables as an elemental fight between the common man and the elites. The wokerati doesn’t care about your cost of living crisis, while the hard right does. Continue reading...

The wokerati doesn’t care about your cost of living crisis, while the hard right does. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國工黨面臨是否支持北海石油與天然氣開採的兩難，因為此舉可能違背其綠色政策，並受到改革黨領袖法拉吉的壓力，後者將此議題塑造成普通民眾與精英之間的對立。
briefing.background: 英國的能源政策歷來受到氣候變遷議題的影響，工黨在選舉中以綠色政策為主打，承諾推動可再生能源。然而，隨著能源價格上漲，部分政黨如改革黨提出北海開採新許可證的建議，試圖藉此降低燃料成本。這一提議在部分工會及媒體中獲得支持，對工黨造成壓力，迫使其在環保與經濟之間做出艱難抉擇。
briefing.analysis: 工黨面臨的挑戰在於如何平衡其綠色承諾與選民對於生活成本的迫切需求。法拉吉的立場強調了普通民眾的利益，並將工黨的綠色政策視為精英主義的表現。這種對立可能使工黨在未來選舉中失去部分支持者，尤其是在經濟困境加劇的情況下。若工黨選擇支持北海開採，將可能引發內部反彈，損害其長期的環保形象。

economy.title: Oil rises and global stocks wobble amid worries over ‘fragile’ ceasefire deal in Middle East – business live
economy.summary: Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial news Oil prices are still rising this morning, as markets question the durability of the ceasefire deal between the US and Iran. Brent crude, the international benchmark, is now up by about 3% to $97.88 a barrel. We’ve obviously had a very big shock in the last month or so, with the conflict breaking out in the Middle East, that has prompted, obviously, much greater market volatility. I mean, we all have to get up in the morning and find out what’s gone on overnight. At least we got up yesterday and found the world was still with us, but it obviously is very volatile. Yesterday was a good day in point to illustrate that.” It’s a very good environmental argument, don’t get me wrong. But there is also an economic argument here as well, because it’s certainly the case for the UK that we are still reliant on gas quite often, but less than we used to be, as the marginal source of energy. But the share of renewables has grown, and I know the UK government’s very focused on this question as to what we learn from the events we’re going through at the moment, what’s the right thing to do.” Continue reading...

Brent crude, the international benchmark, is now up by about 3% to $97.88 a barrel. We’ve obviously had a very big shock in the last month or so, with the conflict breaking out in the Middle East, that has prompted, obviously, much greater market volatility. I mean, we all have to get up in the morning and find out what’s gone on overnight. At least we got up yesterday and found the world was still with us, but it obviously is very volatile. But the share of renewables has grown, and I know the UK government’s very focused on this question as to what we learn from the events we’re going through at the moment, what’s the right thing to do.” Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著美國與伊朗之間的脆弱停火協議引發市場擔憂，油價持續上漲，布蘭特原油價格上漲約3%，達到每桶97.88美元。中東衝突的爆發使市場波動加劇，投資者對全球股市的信心受到影響。
briefing.background: 近期中東衝突的升級，尤其是美國與伊朗之間的緊張關係，對全球能源市場造成了重大影響。油價的上漲反映了市場對供應鏈穩定性的擔憂。儘管英國在可再生能源方面的比例有所增加，但仍然對天然氣有一定依賴，這使得能源政策的調整成為當前政府的重要課題。
briefing.analysis: 各方對於中東局勢的反應不一。美國希望透過停火協議穩定地區局勢，但市場對其持久性表示懷疑，這導致油價上漲，影響全球經濟。英國政府則面臨能源政策的重新評估壓力，尤其是在可再生能源與傳統能源之間的平衡。投資者需密切關注未來局勢發展，以評估對市場的長期影響。

supporting_titles: Global energy stocks plunge as US-Iran ceasefire hits oil - Reuters

economy.title: Oil prices rise as concerns grow over 'fragile' US-Iran ceasefire
economy.summary: Crude prices have reversed from sharp falls on Wednesday when plans to pause the war first emerged.

briefing.news_focus: Crude prices have reversed from sharp falls on Wednesday when plans to pause the war first emerged.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著美國與伊朗之間的脆弱停火協議引發擔憂，原油價格出現回升，扭轉了週三的急劇下跌趨勢，市場對未來供應鏈的穩定性表示關注。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗的緊張關係長期以來影響著全球石油市場。近期的停火協議雖然暫時減少了衝突的風險，但市場對其持久性表示懷疑。過去幾年，伊朗的石油出口受到制裁影響，導致全球供應鏈的波動，進一步加劇了市場的不確定性。
briefing.analysis: 此次原油價格的回升反映了市場對地緣政治風險的敏感性。投資者擔心停火協議的脆弱性可能導致未來供應中斷，進而推高油價。美國與伊朗的立場不同，伊朗希望穩定出口以恢復經濟，而美國則可能在制裁與外交政策之間尋求平衡。這種動態可能使市場面臨更多不穩定性，影響全球經濟復甦。

theme_of_day: 今日新聞的整體敘事主軸圍繞中東局勢的緊張與其對全球經濟的影響，特別是美國與伊朗之間的脆弱停火協議引發的市場擔憂，導致油價上漲並影響全球股市。同時，科技版面中的供應鏈風險問題與中東局勢的動盪相互交織，顯示出在地緣政治不穩定的背景下，企業尤其是AI公司如Anthropic面臨的挑戰。希臘針對社交媒體的政策也反映出各國在應對科技風險方面的共同努力，儘管其與中東局勢的直接關聯性較低，但仍顯示出全球對於數位安全的重視。
